datasets.description: Small deterministic benchmark to demonstrate skill improvement via SkillGym + SkillBench.

tasks.goal: Produce a plan with verification checklist
tasks.context: Task expects explicit planning and concrete verification checks.

tasks.goal: Return output that follows the exact format contract
tasks.context: Task fails if output sections are missing or out of order.
Task rewards concise tool usage and penalizes repeated calls.
tasks.success_template: Completed efficiently with minimal redundant actions
